FIRE.name: Fire
FIRE.pillar: Deals ramping damage to a single target. The longer it focuses on the same enemy, the more damage it deals — similar to an inferno beam.

WATER.name: Water
WATER.pillar: Slows enemies hit by its attacks, reducing their movement speed.

AIR.name: Air
AIR.pillar: Knocks enemies back along the path on each hit.

EARTH.name: Earth
EARTH.pillar: Has a very slow attack speed. Each attack stuns all enemies within its range for 0.5 seconds.

GOLD.name: Gold
GOLD.pillar: Does not attack enemies. Passively generates gold over time.

ICE.name: Ice
ICE.pillar: Freezes enemies solid on hit. Has a slow attack speed.

LIFE.name: Life
LIFE.pillar: Does not actively attack. Revives enemies killed within its range as allied units at the end of the path.

LIGHT.name: Light
LIGHT.pillar: Deals damage proportional to the enemy's current health — the more HP they have, the harder it hits.

POISON.name: Poison
POISON.pillar: Each attack poisons the target for 5 seconds. Poison stacks. Reduces healing efficiency of affected enemies by 75% (stacks).

STEAM.name: Steam
STEAM.pillar: Pushes enemies back along the path based on their current health — lower HP enemies are pushed further back.
